brand.notes: Green brand color confirmed by PIL image extraction on logo PNG: #209060 (93 hits), #108050 (90 hits), #50A080 (83 hits) — all shades of medium-to-dark green. CSS showed #FF5252 red (5 hits) and #4CAF50/#34A853 greens — but the reds are from a generic IDX platform theme, and #4285F4/#34A853 are Google Maps colors. Logo image extraction overrides CSS noise. Marco Island coastal independent with green brand identity.
